from typing import TypeAlias

list: TypeAlias = list[str]
dict: TypeAlias = dict[str, int]
type: TypeAlias = str | int
set: TypeAlias = set[str]
tuple: TypeAlias = tuple[int, ...]
int: TypeAlias = int | float
str: TypeAlias = str | bytes
float: TypeAlias = float | int
bool: TypeAlias = bool | int
bytes: TypeAlias = bytes | bytearray

def process_items(items: list) -> dict:
    result: dict = {}
    for item in items:
        result[item] = len(item)
    return result
